desc: Designed and supported data integration workflows using Azure Data Factory and Azure Data Lake Storage, improving data availability and reliability across systems.
Optimized SQL queries in Azure Databricks and automated operational tasks using Python and Azure Automation, reducing manual effort and improving system performance.
Developed and maintained Power BI dashboards to support business decision-making, collaborating with stakeholders to translate requirements into actionable reporting solutions.
Managed Azure user access and improved operational efficiency by optimizing data workflows and automating repetitive tasks using Python.
Built Power BI reports and gathered business requirements to deliver data-driven solutions, ensuring information was structured and accessible for decision-making.
Developed ETL processes using SSIS and Azure Data Factory, optimized SQL queries, and automated repetitive tasks with Python to improve workflow efficiency.
Created dashboards in Power BI and Looker Studio to support business decision-making, and built ETL processes using Pentaho Data Integration.
Wrote SQL queries in SQL Server and Oracle, and performed data analysis using Excel to support reporting and operational needs.
